title: Immersion Remastered
description: Make your Minecraft experience more lively while keeping true to the vanilla experience.
body:
![Immersion Remastered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/205e39cf3606d7d961315fdcc4420a724ce9f314.png)
# A Modpack that makes Minecraft feel more immersive. 
**Includes mods for performance, quality of life and many visual mods while keeping true to the vanilla experience. Adds mods like "Eating Animation", "Dynamic Surroundings" and "LambDynamicLights" to enhance immersion.**
## How to fix some common issues:
- **Turn V-sync OFF**
- **Cap FPS to 120**
- **Change GUI scale to 3 or below**
- **Unbind unwanted keybinds that mess with compatibility**
